Itsolutions.Itslearning.Web.RestApi.Personal.Element.Models.AssessmentItem

Assessment item which is used to grade a specific answer.

NameDescriptionTypeAdditional information
AssessmentItemId

Assessment item Id.

 integer

None.
Title

Assessment item title, examples: "A", "B", "C" or "Pass", "Fail".

 string

None.
Description

Assessment item description, in many cases not used.

 string

None.
PercentTo

Upper border of the assessment percent range, exclusive.

 decimal number

None.
PercentFromAndIncl

Lower border of the assessment percent range, inclusive.

 decimal number

None.
